error_signature: undefined value when extracting from array variable
title: Undefined value when extracting from array variable
symptom: The user receives 'undefined' when trying to extract a specific field from an array variable after a successful query execution.
applies_when: Using Supabase to fetch a single record
Storing the result in an array variable
not_this_if: The variable type is set to Object instead of Array
root_cause: The user was attempting to extract a value from an array variable when the expected result was a single object. This mismatch in variable type led to the 'undefined' output.
fix_steps: Change the variable type from Array to Object
Re-run the workflow to ensure the correct data is retrieved
Access the desired field from the object variable
agent_instruction: Change the variable type to Object to correctly retrieve the data.
